columns.extraction_plan: The "Results" section specifies that 192 patients were in the "ADT plus D arm" (page 3, Chunk 5). As per the trial design, all patients randomized to the ADT plus D arm were intended to receive docetaxel. Therefore, 192 patients (100%) in the treatment arm received docetaxel.

The "Results" section states: "In the GETUG-AFU15 study, in contrast, the vast majority of patients (79%) in the ADT arm received so-called salvage D within a median time of 18.5 mo (95% CI, 2.9-179)" (page 5, Chunk 5). The total number of patients in the ADT arm was 193 (page 3, Chunk 5). Calculating 79% of 193 gives approximately 152 patients (0.79 * 193 = 152.47).
